name: Strufoli
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together eggs, sugar, vanilla, cinnamon and margarine. Add flour, 1 cup at a time. The last 1/2 cup of flour can be added if necessary to make a smooth dough. Let the dough rest in the bowl, covered with a dish, for 30 minutes.
2. Roll out portions of dough. Cut dough into strips, rounded like pretzels, then cut each strip in half.
3. Heat about 2 1/2 inches of oil in the bottom of a pan. Fry the pieces of dough, a handful at a time. If possible, use a frying basket to make them easier to remove. Place the fried pieces on paper towels to drain.
4. Heat honey until just under boiling point. Place strufoli in a bowl and drizzle honey over them, gently tossing. Arrange on a large platter and sprinkle with confetti. (Shape into a mound on a large flat dish or into a wreath.)
